prevalence.trend: Increasing due to urbanization and post-COVID effects

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: NMHP guidelines (includes psychotherapy, antidepressants, community integration)
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High stigma, psychiatrist shortage (0.75 per 100,000), rural access barriers, overburdened public facilities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Integration with Ayushman Bharat for mental health, growing telepsychiatry, NGO support networks
